speaker: speaker1
text: Please tell me something about your insurance background .

speaker: speaker2
text: I majored in international banking at college so I took many insurance courses . And I worked at an insurance company for my graduation field work .

speaker: speaker1
text: Why do you want to be an insurance agent ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I care about people and I know the importance of insurance .

speaker: speaker1
text: Do you have any work experience in promotion ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , I do . I have worked as a salesman for P & G Company Ltd .

speaker: speaker1
text: Do people respond well to you ?
